name: Cheap.ky
description: Cheap.ky is the Cayman Islands' only independent grocery price comparison platform. It tracks real-time prices across all major supermarkets in Grand Cayman -- Foster's, Hurley's, Cost-U-Less, Priced Right, and Shopright -- so residents and visitors can find the cheapest groceries instantly.
features: Real-time grocery price comparison across 5 stores
Product matching via UPC codes and AI-powered fuzzy matching
Price history tracking and trend analysis
Shopping cart builder to find the cheapest store for your list
Weekly price reports and market analysis

costOfLiving.context: The Cayman Islands has no income tax, but groceries cost 50-100% more than mainland US prices due to import duties and shipping costs. Cheap.ky helps residents save $200-400/month by showing which store has the lowest price for each product.
